content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the failure reconciliation implementation. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, formatting passes. The implementation correctly: records BeadFailed journal events, leaves beads open (no br close), counts attempts across retries, escalates to NeedsOperator after MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES (3), handles idempotent replays via already_recorded detection with repair_task_run_with_disposition, guards against clobbering newer running retries via newer_attempt_exists check, and includes structured tracing (warn on each failure, error on escalation). The daemon_loop integration wires try_reconcile_failure into both worktree and non-worktree failure paths consistently. The failure_outcome threshold logic (attempt_number < MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES) is correct per the spec: attempts 1-2 retryable, attempt 3 escalates. No amendments proposed.

## Amendments

None.
